dialogue_events.dialogue_text: The woman! The woman! Strike her down; it is her plot. Kill her! Kill her!
dialogue_events.source_excerpt: As they advanced there were cries of "The woman! The woman! Strike her down; it is her plot. Kill her! Kill her!"

dialogue_events.dialogue_text: Was there ever such a man!
dialogue_events.source_excerpt: "Was there ever such a man!" she exclaimed. "I know that Barsoom has never before seen your like. Can it be that all Earth men are as you? Alone, a stranger, hunted, threatened, persecuted, you have done in a few short months what in all...

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.

dialogue_events.dialogue_text: I know that Barsoom has never before seen your like. Can it be that all Earth men are as you? Alone, a stranger, hunted, threatened, persecuted, you have done in a few short months what in all the past ages of Barsoom no man has ever done: joined together the wild hordes of the sea bottoms and brought them to fight as allies of a red Martian people.
dialogue_events.source_excerpt: "Was there ever such a man!" she exclaimed. "I know that Barsoom has never before seen your like. Can it be that all Earth men are as you? Alone, a stranger, hunted, threatened, persecuted, you have done in a few short months what in all...

speaker.notes: Context suggests a female speaker, but the source wording is still ambiguous.

dialogue_events.dialogue_text: The answer is easy, Dejah Thoris,
dialogue_events.source_excerpt: "The answer is easy, Dejah Thoris," I replied smiling. "It was not I who did it, it was love, love for Dejah Thoris, a power that would work greater miracles than this you have seen."

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.

dialogue_events.dialogue_text: You may say that now, John Carter, and I may listen, for I am free.
dialogue_events.source_excerpt: "You may say that now, John Carter, and I may listen, for I am free."

dialogue_events.dialogue_text: And more still I have to say, ere it is again too late,
dialogue_events.source_excerpt: "And more still I have to say, ere it is again too late," I returned. "I have done many strange things in my life, many things that wiser men would not have dared, but never in my wildest fancies have I dreamed of winning a Dejah Thoris...

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.

dialogue_events.dialogue_text: I have done many strange things in my life, many things that wiser men would not have dared, but never in my wildest fancies have I dreamed of winning a Dejah Thoris for myself—for never had I dreamed that in all the universe dwelt such a woman as the Princess of Helium. That you are a princess does not abash me, but that you are you is enough to make me doubt my sanity as I ask you, my princess, to be mine.
dialogue_events.source_excerpt: "And more still I have to say, ere it is again too late," I returned. "I have done many strange things in my life, many things that wiser men would not have dared, but never in my wildest fancies have I dreamed of winning a Dejah Thoris...

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.

dialogue_events.dialogue_text: He does not need to be abashed who so well knew the answer to his plea before the plea were made,
dialogue_events.source_excerpt: "He does not need to be abashed who so well knew the answer to his plea before the plea were made," she replied, rising and placing her dear hands upon my shoulders, and so I took her in my arms and kissed her.

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.
